chinese: adv. 懷疑地 (in a way that shows disbelief)
example: Tom looked at Amy suspiciously because she was hiding something behind her back.
notes: be suspicious of: 對...感到懷疑
make + O + OC (adj./n.): 使某人成為...

example: Ms. Jordan tends to be suspicious of everyone, making it difficult for her to trust others.

chinese: n. [C] 科學家 (someone who works in science)
example: David is a social scientist who researches early childhood development.
notes: a science fiction: 科幻小說

chinese: vt. 聲稱；主張 (to say that something is true)
example: Andy claimed to have seen a UFO. However, no one believed him.
notes: claim to have + past participle: 宣稱曾經...

chinese: vt. 取代；代替 (to be used instead of someone or something)
example: The coach replaced the injured player with another one during the game.
notes: replace A with B: 用 B 取代 A
A be replaced: A 被取代
take the place of sb./sth. = replace sb./sth.: 取代某人／某物

example: My cousin is suffering from heart disease and has to stay in the hospital.
notes: suffer from / catch / get a disease: 患上某疾病
contagious / infectious disease: 有傳染性的疾病

chinese: n. [U] 癌症 (a serious disease in which cells grow in an uncontrolled way)
example: After years of smoking, Dorian was told by the doctor that he had cancer.

chinese: adj. 過重的 (too heavy or fat)
example: After sitting all day and eating snacks every night, Peter became overweight.
notes: How much do you weigh?: 你多重?

chinese: n. [U] 生產；製作 (the process of making something)
example: The new model of this cellphone will be in production next year.
notes: be in production / out of production: 量產中／停產
production 也可指電視或電影的製作上映

chinese: n. [C][U] 氣候 (the typical weather conditions)
example: The desert climate is usually very hot and dry.
notes: warm / cool / wet / humid / dry climate: 溫暖／涼爽／潮濕／溼熱／乾燥的氣候

chinese: n. [C] 品牌 (a type of product having a particular name)
example: I always buy a certain brand of milk because it tastes better than the others.

chinese: vt.; vi. 為......宣傳；打廣告 (to tell the public about a product)
example: Big companies may find a number of clever ways to advertise their products in TV shows.
Mia put an advertisement for her shop online to attract more customers.

chinese: n. [C] 消費者 (someone who buys goods)
example: Most consumers think that this new sports watch is very useful.
notes: costume (n.): 特殊場合服裝

example: An LED light bulb consumes less energy than a traditional one.
notes: LED = light-emitting diode: 發光二極體
fit / unfit for human consumption: 適合／不適合人類食用

chinese: n. 食用；攝取；消耗；購買
adj. 確信的 (feeling sure about something)
example: Julie is convinced of the existence of ghosts, so she's afraid of being alone in the dark by herself.
notes: antonym: unconvinced
be convinced of: 對...深信不疑
convincing (adj.): 具說服力的；令人信服的
convincing victory / win: 一面倒的勝利

chinese: vt. 使確信；使相信 (to make someone believe something)
example: Mike is trying to convince the interviewers that he's the right person for the position.
notes: convince sb. that + S + V: 說服某人某事
position: 位置；職位

chinese: n. [U] 贊同；支持 (support or approval)
example: The government's new policy of reducing plastic use has won favor with the citizens.
notes: US: favor / UK: favour
favor A over B: 喜歡 A 勝過 B
be in one's favor: 對某人有利
do / ask sb. a favor: 幫／請求某人一個忙

example: Eason switched our date from Tuesday to Friday because he was too busy.
In recent years, winters in Taiwan have been gradually getting warmer.
notes: antonym: suddenly

example: There will be a gradual change in the color of the meat as it cooks.
notes: antonym: sudden

chinese: n. [C] 企圖 (an act of taking steps to do something)
example: The students made an attempt to clean the classroom quickly.
The cat attempted to catch the fish in the pond; unfortunately, it fell into the water by accident.
notes: a vain attempt: 徒勞無功的嘗試
attempt at + N/V-ing: 對...的嘗試
attempt to + V: 試圖
intend to + V / plan to + V: 打算做某事
by accident = by chance = accidentally: 意外地

chinese: adj. 可持續的；對環境無害的 (not harmful to the environment)
example: This company uses paper and packaging that are 100% sustainable.
notes: sustainable development: 永續發展
LOHAS: 樂活

example: Donna's father is a classical musician, and she hopes to become a concert pianist [as well].
notes: also / too
as well 和 too 通常放在句尾

chinese: phr. 採取行動 (to take action)
example: The government is [taking steps] to prevent the disease from spreading.
notes: prevent / keep / stop ... from V-ing: 預防／阻止...

example: Not every student in this school is [in favor of] the new rule.
notes: be in favor of + N / V-ing

chinese: phr. 提到；談到 (when talking about something)
example: [When it comes to] jumping rope, John is undoubtedly the best in his class.
notes: when it comes to + N / V-ing, S + V
undoubtedly = absolutely = definitely: 無疑地
